seoTitle: Apply a Background to All Slides in Canva
metaDescription: Save time by applying one consistent background across every slide in your Canva presentation for a cohesive, professional look.
intro: Manually setting a background on each slide is tedious, especially for longer presentations. This tutorial shows how to apply a single background across all slides in Canva at once, keeping your design consistent and saving time.

steps.heading: Review your Canva design features
steps.body: Get an overview of where background settings live within a Canva presentation.

steps.heading: Select a background
steps.body: Choose the background image or color you want to apply throughout your presentation.

steps.heading: Apply the background to all slides
steps.body: Use Canva's tools to push the chosen background across every slide in the presentation at once.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for presentation design
steps.body: Keep readability and brand consistency in mind as you finalize your slides.

faq.question: Why apply the same background to every slide?
faq.answer: A consistent background helps maintain brand consistency and gives your presentation a cohesive, professional look.

faq.question: Does this save time compared to manual editing?
faq.answer: Yes, applying a background to all slides at once is significantly faster than updating each slide individually.

faq.question: Can I still customize individual slides after applying a background?
faq.answer: Yes, you can still adjust individual slide elements after the shared background has been applied.

faq.question: Is this useful for educators as well as businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, both educators enhancing lesson visuals and businesses maintaining brand consistency can benefit from this feature.
